name: CPU Monitor
description: CPU monitoring plugin for StreamController on Linux, reading utilisation, memory, temperature, power and clock speed straight from /proc and /sys. Works on any CPU (AMD and Intel).

descriptions.en_US: CPU monitoring plugin for StreamController on Linux, reading utilisation, memory, temperature, power and clock speed straight from /proc and /sys. Works on any CPU (AMD and Intel).

author: RustyTheDalek
